meta.description: Test scenarios for gate-evidence-truth skill evaluation

scenarios.name: Evidence classification correctness
scenarios.trigger: evidence check for phase completion gate
assertions: Design document (L5) not counted toward gate minimum

scenarios.name: Gate minimum enforcement — insufficient evidence
scenarios.trigger: evidence check for milestone completion gate
assertions: L4 does NOT meet milestone_completion gate minimum (L2 + one L1)
Remediation plan specifies: need L2 continuity record AND at least one L1 live session proof

scenarios.name: Mock-only detection for integration claims
scenarios.trigger: evidence check for PR review gate
assertions: Integration test with mocked fs reclassified as L4 (not L3)
L4 does NOT meet pr_review gate minimum (L3)
Anti-pattern AP-4 detected: mock-only integration claim
Remediation: create true integration test with real file I/O

scenarios.name: Completion honesty — claims without evidence
scenarios.trigger: evidence check for phase completion gate
assertions: PLAN.md completion status classified as L5 (documentation)
Review comment classified as L5 (not executable evidence)
L5 does NOT meet any gate minimum
Anti-pattern AP-3 detected: documentation accepted as proof
Anti-pattern AP-5 detected: LLM review treated as evidence
Remediation: produce L2+ evidence (run tests, capture continuity record)

scenarios.name: Deployment gate — full evidence verification
scenarios.trigger: evidence check for deployment readiness gate

artifacts.description: Live OpenCode session testing delegation flow
Integration tests for all module boundaries

assertions: All three lenses activated (Dev, Architect, PM)
Dev lens: test integrity verified, no mock-only integration claims
Architect lens: evidence hierarchy spans L1-L4, regression vectors checked
PM lens: live runtime proof exists, completion claims backed by evidence
